mrbits.description: ncurses veteran, 50s, knows raw escape sequences. Blunt, short, reads source not docs.

noodle.description: Textual/Rich user, 30s, deployment dashboard builder. Friendly, comparative, asks 'is this like X?'

ghost_pipe.description: Legacy CLI maintainer, 30k-line argparse tool. Lurker, speaks rarely, always practical.

synthwave.description: Go (Bubble Tea) + Rust (ratatui), cross-ecosystem. Energetic, makes framework comparisons.
